channel.title: The New Beverly Cinema
channel.description: Schedule and program for The New Beverly Cinema (Quentin Tarantino's revival theater in Los Angeles).

item.title: Crimson Tide / Déjà Vu
item.description:
Dynamic Denzel Washington ( The Pelican Brief ) joins Hollywood favorite Gene Hackman ( The Firm ) in this intense action thriller that’s a smash hit with audiences and critics alike! In the midst of a global crisis, the USS Alabama receives an unconfirmed order to launch its nuclear missiles – signaling the start of World War III! The tension quickly rises as the sub’s respected commander (Hackman) and his brilliant executive officer (Washington) clash over the validity of their orders… battling each other for control of the sub! As this epic struggle rages under the sea, Crimson Tide brings motion picture excitement to a new level – and you to the edge of your seat! (Hollywood Pictures) Academy Award winner Denzel Washington (Best Actor, Training Day , 2001) joins forces with blockbuster producer Jerry Bruckheimer and mega-hit director Tony Scott for Déjà Vu – the powerful, fast-paced action-thriller with a spectacular mind-bending twist. Called in to recover evidence in the aftermath of a horrific explosion on a New Orleans ferry, Federal agent Doug Carlin (Washington) gets pulled away from the scene and taken to a top-secret government lab that uses a time-shifting surveillance device to help prevent crime. But can it help Carlin change the past? (Disney)
Cast: Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Screenplay by Michael Schiffer, Story by Michael Schiffer and Richard P. Henrick | Starring: Denzel Washington, Gene Hackman, Matt Craven, George Dzundza, Viggo Mortensen, James Gandolfini | Year: 1995 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Bill Marsilii & Terry Rossio | Starring: Denzel Washington, Paula Patton, Bruce Greenwood, Adam Goldberg, Jim Caviezel | Year: 2006 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 126 minuti

Orari: Sat May 30 - 5:30 pm / 7:55 pm

item.title: Django Unchained
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino’s hit western stars Jamie Foxx as Django Unchained , a slave freed by bounty hunter Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) who needs his help tracking down a trio of wanted outlaws. In exchange, Schultz agrees to help Django free his wife from evil plantation owner Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio). To a bounty hunter it’s just business but to Django it’s personal! “In Django , Tarantino is a man unchained , creating his most articulate, intriguing, provoking, appalling, hilarious, exhilarating, scathing and downright entertaining film yet.” – Betsy Sharkey, Los Angeles Times
Cast: Director: Quentin Tarantino | Writer: Quentin Tarantino | Starring: Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio, Kerry Washington, Samuel L. Jackson, Walton Goggins, Dennis Christopher, James Remar | Year: 2012 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 165 minuti

Orari: Fri May 08 - 11:59 pm

item.title: The Kentucky Fried Movie
item.description:
Before hitting it big with Airplane! , the Zucker/Abrahams/Zucker team wrote the riotously funny sketch comedy classic The Kentucky Fried Movie . Filled with fake news broadcasts, short commercial parodies, trailers for faux exploitation films, and a centerpiece spoof of Bruce Lee movies, these comic masters serve up a plethora of gut-busting gags flying a mile a minute.
Cast: Director: John Landis | Writer: David Zucker & Jim Abrahams & Jerry Zucker | Year: 1977 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 83 minuti

Orari: Sat May 09 - 11:59 pm

item.title: House of Cards (IB Tech Print) / From Hell to Victory
item.description:
The blood-hot diary of the people who fight the war of intrigue across the face of the globe! A retired American boxer, broke in Paris, is hired to look after the eight-year-old son of a wealthy widow. But he soon finds himself ensnared in an international conspiracy in this spellbinding Hitchcockian thriller. George Peppard, Inger Stevens, and Orson Welles star. Six friends (George Peppard, George Hamilton, Horst Bucholz, Annie Duperey, Jean-Pierre Cassel and Sam Wanamaker) meet in a Paris café in 1939 and vow to return each year at the same time for a reunion. But the impending world war lasts longer than anyone thought, and it delays their rendezvous, with bittersweet results. The sextet separate and go their separate ways, some ending up in the military and some in the French Resistance. Umberto Lenzi ( Paranoia, Nightmare City ) directed under the pseudonym Hank Milestone. The gorgeous cinematography – at least what isn’t stock footage from other previous Italian war epics – was lensed by future Almodóvar cameraman José Luis Alcane and the score is by Riz Ortolani ( Mondo Cane, One on Top of The Other ). Co-starring Capucine, Ray Lovelock and Howard Vernon.
Cast: Director: John Guillermin | Writer: Screenplay by James P. Bonner [Irving Ravetch & Harriet Frank, Jr.] based on the novel by Stanley Ellin | Starring: George Peppard, Inger Stevens, Orson Welles, Keith Mitchell, Maxine Audley | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Umberto Lenzi | Starring: George Peppard, George Hamilton, Horst Buchholz, Ann Deperey, Jean-Pierre Cassel, Capucine, Sam Wanamaker | Year: 1979 | Country: Italy/Spain/France | Format: 35mm
Durata: 97 minuti

Orari: Wed May 06 - 7:30 pm / 9:45 pm

item.title: All the Way Boys / Convoy Buddies
item.description:
Those Trinity boys take to the air and still fly off the handle! The charismatic Terence Hill & Bud Spencer star in a modern era film playing South American bush pilots whose most lucrative pastime is faking airplane crashes to collect insurance cash. But when they crash in the Amazon jungle for real, they’ll encounter a ruthless mining operation where they’ll side with the labor. An Italian buddy comedy shamelessly aping the success of Terence Hill & Bud Spencer! Michael Coby & Paul Smith (billed on the American poster as Terrence Hall & Bob Spencer, over which Smith successfully sued his distributor) play a pair of bumbling crooks hired to drive a shipment from Italy to France. But what they don’t know is their huge haul is actually illegal guns and they’ve got trigger happy henchmen hot on their wheels in this hilarious and hijinks-filled road trip adventure.
Cast: Director: Giuseppe Colizzi | Writer: Screenplay by Giuseppe Colizzi and Barbara Alberti and Amedo Pagani | Starring: Terence Hill, Bud Spencer, René Kolldehoff, Antoine Saint-John, Cyril Cusack | Year: 1972 | Country: Italy | Format: 35mm | Director: Giuliano Carnimeo (as Arthur Pitt) | Starring: Michael Coby (as Terrence Hall), Paul Smith (as Bob Spencer), Dominic Barto, Giuliana Calandra | Year: 1975 | Country: Italy/Spain | Format: 35mm
Durata: 73 minuti

Orari: Mon May 11 - 7:30 pm / 9:35 pm

item.title: Django Unchained
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino’s hit western stars Jamie Foxx as Django Unchained , a slave freed by bounty hunter Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) who needs his help tracking down a trio of wanted outlaws. In exchange, Schultz agrees to help Django free his wife from evil plantation owner Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio). To a bounty hunter it’s just business but to Django it’s personal! “In Django , Tarantino is a man unchained , creating his most articulate, intriguing, provoking, appalling, hilarious, exhilarating, scathing and downright entertaining film yet.” – Betsy Sharkey, Los Angeles Times
Cast: Director: Quentin Tarantino | Writer: Quentin Tarantino | Starring: Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio, Kerry Washington, Samuel L. Jackson, Walton Goggins, Dennis Christopher, James Remar | Year: 2012 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 165 minuti

Orari: Fri May 15 - 11:59 pm

item.title: Man on Fire
item.description:
A promise to protect. A vow to avenge. A burnt out former CIA operative reluctantly accepts a new position as bodyguard for a businessman’s young daughter in Mexico City. But when she’s kidnapped while under his guard, he’ll unleash hell on everyone involved. His art is death, and he’s about to paint his masterpiece. Denzel Washington headlines a stylish and intense action thriller from director Tony Scott, with an incredible supporting ensemble that includes Christopher Walken, Dakota Fanning, Radha Mitchell, Marc Anthony, Giancarlo Giannini, Mickey Rourke, and Rachel Ticotin.
Cast: Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Screenplay by Brian Helgeland based on the novel by A.J. Quinnell | Starring: Denzel Washington, Dakota Fanning, Christopher Walken, Giancarlo Giannini, Radha Mitchell, Marc Anthony, Rachel Ticotin, Mickey Rourke | Year: 2004 | Country: USA/UK | Format: 35mm
Durata: 146 minuti

Orari: Sun May 17 - 6:30 pm

item.title: Show People / The Matinee Idol
item.description:
Marion Davies has stars in her eyes in this “delightful look at silent Hollywood” (Time Out Film Guide), directed by King Vidor and costarring William Haines. All Peggy Pepper (Davies) wants in life is to be a great dramatic actress. But when rowdy slapstick comic Billy Boyle (Haines) gives Peggy her big break, she puts her dreams on hold and becomes America’s comedy queen. So when prestigious High Arts Studio offers her the chance to play serious roles and Peggy gets an awfully swelled head, it’s up to Billy to burst her bubble and bring Peggy down to earth. Loosely based on Gloria Swanson’s career. Show People features cameos by Charlie Chaplin, Douglas Fairbanks, John Gilbert, William S. Hart and more in this “bright and snappy ode to Hollywood stardom” (Allrovi.com). (Warner Bros) A rarely screened early silent film from director Frank Capra! When Ginger Bolivar’s amateur stock company is invited to join superstar Don Wilson’s Broadway review, little does Ginger (Bessie Love) know that recently hired bit-part actor Harry Mann (Johnnie Walker) and Don are one and the same. Don, you see, believes the oh-so-serious Bolivar Players are oh-so-unintentionally funny, and has brought them to the Big Apple as a comedy act. But when “Harry” falls for Ginger, Don soon learns that humiliating the woman he loves is no laughing matter! (Sony)
Cast: Director: King Vidor | Starring: Marion Davies, William Haines, Dell Henderson, Paul Ralli | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Frank Capra | Starring: Bessie Love, Johnny Walker, Ernest Hilliard, Lionel Belmore, David Mir | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 56 minuti

Orari: Sun May 24 - 6:30 pm / 8:25 pm

item.title: Akeelah and the Bee
item.description:
Changing the world one word at a time. An 11-year-old Crenshaw middle schooler discovers an aptitude for spelling but must overcome family objections and a host of colorful characters in her quest to compete in the national championship. Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne, and Angela Bassett star in an entertaining & inspirational crowd-pleaser.
Cast: Director: Doug Atchison | Writer: Doug Atchison | Starring: Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne, Angela Bassett, Curtis Armstrong | Year: 2006 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 112 minuti

Orari: Sat May 09 - 2:00 pm

item.title: Django Unchained
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino’s hit western stars Jamie Foxx as Django Unchained , a slave freed by bounty hunter Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) who needs his help tracking down a trio of wanted outlaws. In exchange, Schultz agrees to help Django free his wife from evil plantation owner Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio). To a bounty hunter it’s just business but to Django it’s personal! “In Django , Tarantino is a man unchained , creating his most articulate, intriguing, provoking, appalling, hilarious, exhilarating, scathing and downright entertaining film yet.” – Betsy Sharkey, Los Angeles Times
Cast: Director: Quentin Tarantino | Writer: Quentin Tarantino | Starring: Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio, Kerry Washington, Samuel L. Jackson, Walton Goggins, Dennis Christopher, James Remar | Year: 2012 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 165 minuti

Orari: Fri May 29 - 11:59 pm

item.title: The Hallelujah Trail (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
See how the west was fun in this rip-roaring, way-out comedy from The Magnificent Seven director John Sturges. The genre gets turned upside down with gut-busting results as a cross-country whiskey shipment gets hilariously threatened by thirsty travelers, the Temperance movement, Sioux Indians, quicksand, sandstorms and other obstacles. Filmed in Ultra Panavision 70, The Hallelujah Trail is jam-packed with an epic all-star cast: Burt Lancaster, Lee Remick, Donald Pleasence, Brian Keith, Martin Landau and more!
Cast: Director: Jim Sturges | Starring: Burt Lancaster, Lee Remick, Jim Hutton, Pamela Tiffin, Donald Pleasence, Brian Keith, Martin Landau | Year: 1965 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 143 minuti

Orari: Thu May 21 - 7:30 pm

item.title: Cinderella (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
Walt Disney’s timeless animated masterpiece delightfully dazzles in sparkling I.B. Technicolor 35mm! When her cruel stepmother and mean-spirited siblings block the quiet but kindhearted Cinderella from attending the Royal Ball, she’ll find help from her Fairy Godmother and a few mice friends. But with their spell breaking at the stroke of midnight, she’ll lose a single glass slipper that will fatefully become the key to her fairytale ending.
Cast: Director: Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson, Clyde Geronimi | Year: 1950 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 74 minuti

Orari: Sat May 30 - 2:00 pm

item.title: What’s So Bad About Feeling Good? (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
What’s So Bad About Feeling Good ? New York is about to find out when a wayward toucan unleashes a miraculous virus across the city, infecting its citizens with a euphoric high and the delirious desire to do good. A beatnik former ad exec (George Peppard) gets a new lease on life but will his girlfriend (Mary Tyler Moore) be so lucky? As the outbreak spreads & the Big Apple gets turned upside down, a government lackey (Dom DeLuise) is sent to find a fix. It’s an off-beat counterculture comedy that’s a good-natured good time. It’s sure to cure what ails you!
Cast: Director: George Seaton | Starring: George Peppard, Mary Tyler Moore, Don Stroud, Susan Saint James, Dom DeLuise | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 93 minuti

Orari: Thu May 07 - 7:30 pm

item.title: You’re Not So Tough / Hit the Road
item.description:
HOLD EVERYTHING… the gang’s here again! Fists fly and jaws crack! As the “Kids” and the “Guys” join forces to round up a racket ring in the rowdiest, roughest, fastest, funniest package of dynamite entertainment. Out of the slums of NYC, our scrappy crew find themselves riding the rails and, ultimately land at a California ranch, where their kindly host’s backstory could create complications… and pull at their heart strings. The mob meets its match and the toughies get the tender treatment in their most dramatic adventure! The Dead End Kids and Little Tough Guys want out of their juvenile reformatory, but no one wants them because they’re the orphans of gangland criminals. Their superintendent has a plan: release the kids to the newly reformed, fresh-out-of-prison former leader of their parents’ gang. But has their new sponsor truly gone good or is it all an act? And what do his former mob associates have in store for him?
Cast: Director: Joe May | Writer: Screenplay by Arthur T. Horman based on a story by Maxwell Aley | Starring: Nan Grey, Billy Halop, Huntz Hall, Gabriel Dell, Bernard Punsly, Bobby Jordon, Henry Armetta, Rosina Galli | Year: 1940 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Joe May | Writer: Screenplay by Robert Lee Johnson, Brenda Weisberg, Original story by Robert Lee Johnson | Starring: Gladys George, Barton MacLane, Billy Halop, Huntz Hall, Gabriel Dell, Bernard Punsly, Evelyn Ankers, Charles Lang, Shemp Howard, Bobs Watson | Year: 1941 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 61 minuti

Orari: Mon May 04 - 7:30 pm / 9:05 pm

item.title: The Hallelujah Trail (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
See how the west was fun in this rip-roaring, way-out comedy from The Magnificent Seven director John Sturges. The genre gets turned upside down with gut-busting results as a cross-country whiskey shipment gets hilariously threatened by thirsty travelers, the Temperance movement, Sioux Indians, quicksand, sandstorms and other obstacles. Filmed in Ultra Panavision 70, The Hallelujah Trail is jam-packed with an epic all-star cast: Burt Lancaster, Lee Remick, Donald Pleasence, Brian Keith, Martin Landau and more!
Cast: Director: Jim Sturges | Starring: Burt Lancaster, Lee Remick, Jim Hutton, Pamela Tiffin, Donald Pleasence, Brian Keith, Martin Landau | Year: 1965 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 143 minuti

Orari: Fri May 22 - 7:00 pm

item.title: Cinderella (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
Walt Disney’s timeless animated masterpiece delightfully dazzles in sparkling I.B. Technicolor 35mm! When her cruel stepmother and mean-spirited siblings block the quiet but kindhearted Cinderella from attending the Royal Ball, she’ll find help from her Fairy Godmother and a few mice friends. But with their spell breaking at the stroke of midnight, she’ll lose a single glass slipper that will fatefully become the key to her fairytale ending.
Cast: Director: Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson, Clyde Geronimi | Year: 1950 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 74 minuti

Orari: Sun May 31 - 2:00 pm

item.title: Frankenstein
item.description:
Boris Karloff stars as the screen’s most tragic and iconic monster in director James Whale’s unforgettable adaptation of the Mary Shelley novel. Obsessed with the idea of constructing new life, Dr. Frankenstein pieces together a body from the parts of others. But his experiment in reanimation unleashes a creation for which the world is not yet ready.
Cast: Director: James Whale | Writer: Screen play by Garrett Fort & Francis Edward based upon the story by Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley, adapted by John L. Balderston from the play by Peggy Webling | Starring: Colin Clive, Mae Clarke, John Boles, Boris Karloff, Dwight Frye, Edward van Sloan, Frederick Kerr | Year: 1931 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 70 minuti

Orari: Sat May 16 - 2:00 pm

item.title: Akeelah and the Bee
item.description:
Changing the world one word at a time. An 11-year-old Crenshaw middle schooler discovers an aptitude for spelling but must overcome family objections and a host of colorful characters in her quest to compete in the national championship. Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne, and Angela Bassett star in an entertaining & inspirational crowd-pleaser.
Cast: Director: Doug Atchison | Writer: Doug Atchison | Starring: Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne, Angela Bassett, Curtis Armstrong | Year: 2006 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 112 minuti

Orari: Sun May 10 - 2:00 pm

item.title: The Groundstar Conspiracy / P.J. (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
George Peppard and Michael Sarrazin engage in a monumental battle of wills in this critically acclaimed espionage thriller from the early 1970s. The riveting suspense yarn begins when an explosion smashes Groundstar, a top secret government space installation. Only one scientist, a spy placed within the organization to steal the plant’s secrets, survives. But the blast has left him severely burned and unable to recall anything that happened. It’s then up to Peppard, an overbearing government security head, to do whatever is necessary to get the spy’s memory back. Failing that, the investigator plans to use the impaired scientist as human bait to bring those behind The Groundstar Conspiracy to the surface. The terrifying drama, fashioned in the Hitchcock tradition, makes spectacular use of the breathtaking scenery shot on location at Vancouver Island. (Universal Studios) Gun in one hand, a woman in the other! George Peppard is P.J. , a hard-drinking New York private eye always on the hunt for his next paycheck. But when he reluctantly takes a gig to protect the mistress of a mysterious millionaire, he’ll soon be swept into a perilous world of murder and intrigue… all the while falling for the woman in his charge. A rarely-seen and not-to-be-missed neo-noir, P.J. features Raymond Burr and Gayle Hunnicutt in stellar supporting roles.
Cast: Director: Lamont Johnson | Writer: Screenplay by Matthew Howard based on "The Alien" by L.P. Davies | Starring: George Peppard, Michael Sarrazin, Christine Belford, Cliff Potts, James Olson | Year: 1972 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: John Guillermin | Starring: George Peppard, Raymond Burr, Gayle Hunnicutt, Brock Peters, Wilfrid Hyde-White, Susan Saint James | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 108 minuti

Orari: Tue May 12 - 7:30 pm / 9:35 pm

item.title: Waxwork
item.description:
Stop on by and give afterlife a try. A group of suburban college students encounter a morbid wax museum and soon discover that you can step inside the hall of horrors, but dare you pay the price? Gremlins star Zach Galligan and Valley Girl icon Deborah Foreman headline an ‘80s horror hit that’s overflowing with stellar practical effects work, familiar faces, and ghoulish glee.
Cast: Director: Anthony Hickox | Writer: Anthony Hickox | Starring: Zach Galligan, Deborah Foreman, Michelle Johnson, Dana Ashbrook, Miles O'Keeffe, Patrick Macnee, David Warner | Year: 1988 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 96 minuti

Orari: Sat May 23 - 11:59 pm

item.title: The Victors
item.description:
The award-winning screenwriter of The Bridge on the River Kwai and The Guns of Navarone , Carl Foreman, wrote, directed, and produced the sprawling, all-star World War II epic The Victors . The film follows a large ensemble of battle-weary American infantry soldiers in a series of vignettes, from fighting in Italy to uneasy peace in Berlin, interspersed with newsreel-type propaganda from back home that contradicts their grim reality. The movie’s monumental shoot filmed on location across Europe with an impressive cast that includes Vince Edwards, Albert Finney, George Hamilton, and George Peppard, as well as Jeanne Moreau, Romy Schneider, and Elke Sommer.
Cast: Director: Carl Foreman | Starring: Vince Edwards, Albert Finney, George Hamilton, Melina Mercouri, Jeanne Moreau, George Peppard, Maurice Ronet, Rosanna Schiaffino, Romy Schneider, Elke Sommer, Eli Wallach | Year: 1963 | Country: UK/USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 155 minuti

Orari: Tue May 26 - 7:30 pm

item.title: Show People / The Matinee Idol
item.description:
Marion Davies has stars in her eyes in this “delightful look at silent Hollywood” (Time Out Film Guide), directed by King Vidor and costarring William Haines. All Peggy Pepper (Davies) wants in life is to be a great dramatic actress. But when rowdy slapstick comic Billy Boyle (Haines) gives Peggy her big break, she puts her dreams on hold and becomes America’s comedy queen. So when prestigious High Arts Studio offers her the chance to play serious roles and Peggy gets an awfully swelled head, it’s up to Billy to burst her bubble and bring Peggy down to earth. Loosely based on Gloria Swanson’s career. Show People features cameos by Charlie Chaplin, Douglas Fairbanks, John Gilbert, William S. Hart and more in this “bright and snappy ode to Hollywood stardom” (Allrovi.com). (Warner Bros) A rarely screened early silent film from director Frank Capra! When Ginger Bolivar’s amateur stock company is invited to join superstar Don Wilson’s Broadway review, little does Ginger (Bessie Love) know that recently hired bit-part actor Harry Mann (Johnnie Walker) and Don are one and the same. Don, you see, believes the oh-so-serious Bolivar Players are oh-so-unintentionally funny, and has brought them to the Big Apple as a comedy act. But when “Harry” falls for Ginger, Don soon learns that humiliating the woman he loves is no laughing matter! (Sony)
Cast: Director: King Vidor | Starring: Marion Davies, William Haines, Dell Henderson, Paul Ralli | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Frank Capra | Starring: Bessie Love, Johnny Walker, Ernest Hilliard, Lionel Belmore, David Mir | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 56 minuti

Orari: Sat May 23 - 7:00 pm / 8:55 pm

item.title: A Woman of Affairs / The Single Standard
item.description:
Greta Garbo is the “unlucky in love” heroine in this silent-screen adaptation of Michael Arlen’s highly controversial novel The Green Hat. After losing the man of her dreams (John Gilbert) due to the meddling of his disapproving father, Diana Merrick (Garbo) reluctantly weds another admirer (John Mack Brown). These dubious marital beginnings become even more questionable when her new husband takes his own life. Immediately, all eyes turn to Diana, and her free-spirited lifestyle is deemed his unofficial cause of death. Socially chastised, Diana decides to live up to her reputation and ventures on a series of foreign affairs, amorously globe hopping with dignitaries from London to Cairo. This bittersweet tale of love really begins to unfold when Diana is at last reunited with her one true love – only to learn of his recent engagement. Garbo’s all-star supporting cast includes Douglas Fairbanks Jr. in an early screen appearance as Diana’s alcoholic brother and Hobart Bosworth as the meddling father. (Warner Bros) For a number of generations, men have done as they please – and women have done as men pleased. Not so for San Francisco socialite Arden Stuart (Greta Garbo). To be fulfilled, she wants the freedom men have to take – or leave – love where they find it. So she embarks on a sensual seafaring odyssey with a boxer-turned-artist who declares, “There are many theories about love, but only one answer: Equality and perfect freedom.” But can any woman be free without paying a terrible price? In this daring late silent, the divine Garbo is ideally cast playing a character in many ways like herself: unconventional, independent, desired. (Warner Bros)
Cast: Director: Clarence Brown | Starring: Greta Garbo, John Gilbert, Lewis Stone, John Mack Brown, Douglas Fairbanks Jr. | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: John S. Robertson | Starring: Greta Garbo, Nils Asther, John Mack Brown, Dorothy Sebastian | Year: 1929 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 73 minuti

Orari: Thu May 14 - 7:30 pm / 9:40 pm

item.title: The Black Arrow / Fortunes of Captain Blood
item.description:
In this crackling adaptation of the Robert Louis Stevenson tale, a knight returns from the War of the Roses only to learn that his father was murdered under mysterious circumstances. When he sets out to discover the truth, he finds his own life in jeopardy. A cast full of familiar favorites drives this lively adventure, including Louis Hayward, Janet Blair, George Macready, Edgar Buchanan and Rhys Williams, and directed by Gordon Douglas. (Columbia Pictures) Louis Hayward portrays Captain Peter Blood, a former doctor who takes to piracy after he is exiled from England for treating the wounds of an enemy soldier. During his travels, Blood meets the beautiful Isabelita (Patricia Medina), who happens to be the niece of Blood’s arch-nemesis, the Marquis de Riconete (George Macready). (Sony Pictures)
Cast: Director: Gordon Douglas | Writer: Screen play by Richard Schayer & David P. Sheppard & Thomas Seller | Starring: Louis Hayward, Janet Blair, George Macready, Edgar Buchanan | Year: 1948 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Gordon Douglas | Writer: Screenplay by Michael Hogan and Robert Libott and Frank Burt based upon the novel by Rafael Sabatini | Starring: Louis Hayward, Patricia Medina, George Macready, Alfonso Bedoya, Dona Drake, Lowell Gilmore | Year: 1950 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 90 minuti

Orari: Wed May 27 - 7:30 pm / 9:15 pm

item.title: House of Cards (IB Tech Print) / From Hell to Victory
item.description:
The blood-hot diary of the people who fight the war of intrigue across the face of the globe! A retired American boxer, broke in Paris, is hired to look after the eight-year-old son of a wealthy widow. But he soon finds himself ensnared in an international conspiracy in this spellbinding Hitchcockian thriller. George Peppard, Inger Stevens, and Orson Welles star. Six friends (George Peppard, George Hamilton, Horst Bucholz, Annie Duperey, Jean-Pierre Cassel and Sam Wanamaker) meet in a Paris café in 1939 and vow to return each year at the same time for a reunion. But the impending world war lasts longer than anyone thought, and it delays their rendezvous, with bittersweet results. The sextet separate and go their separate ways, some ending up in the military and some in the French Resistance. Umberto Lenzi ( Paranoia, Nightmare City ) directed under the pseudonym Hank Milestone. The gorgeous cinematography – at least what isn’t stock footage from other previous Italian war epics – was lensed by future Almodóvar cameraman José Luis Alcane and the score is by Riz Ortolani ( Mondo Cane, One on Top of The Other ). Co-starring Capucine, Ray Lovelock and Howard Vernon.
Cast: Director: John Guillermin | Writer: Screenplay by James P. Bonner [Irving Ravetch & Harriet Frank, Jr.] based on the novel by Stanley Ellin | Starring: George Peppard, Inger Stevens, Orson Welles, Keith Mitchell, Maxine Audley | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Umberto Lenzi | Starring: George Peppard, George Hamilton, Horst Buchholz, Ann Deperey, Jean-Pierre Cassel, Capucine, Sam Wanamaker | Year: 1979 | Country: Italy/Spain/France | Format: 35mm
Durata: 97 minuti

Orari: Tue May 05 - 7:30 pm / 9:45 pm

item.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
item.description:
From filmmaker Steven Spielberg, An American Tail: Fievel Goes West is a delightful full-length animated feature that continues the adventures of the brave young mouse who captured audiences’ hearts everywhere. Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Burp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into… mouseburgers! This heartwarming family film features the voices of James Stewart, Dom DeLuise, John Lovitz, Amy Irving and many more along with an original score including “Dreams to Dream” sung by Linda Ronstadt. (Universal Studios)
Cast: Director: Phil Nibbelink, Simon Wells | Writer: Screenplay by Flint Dille, Story by Charles Swenson, Created by David Kirschner | Year: 1991 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 75 minuti

Orari: Sat May 09 - 10:00 am

item.title: Man on Fire
item.description:
A promise to protect. A vow to avenge. A burnt out former CIA operative reluctantly accepts a new position as bodyguard for a businessman’s young daughter in Mexico City. But when she’s kidnapped while under his guard, he’ll unleash hell on everyone involved. His art is death, and he’s about to paint his masterpiece. Denzel Washington headlines a stylish and intense action thriller from director Tony Scott, with an incredible supporting ensemble that includes Christopher Walken, Dakota Fanning, Radha Mitchell, Marc Anthony, Giancarlo Giannini, Mickey Rourke, and Rachel Ticotin.
Cast: Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Screenplay by Brian Helgeland based on the novel by A.J. Quinnell | Starring: Denzel Washington, Dakota Fanning, Christopher Walken, Giancarlo Giannini, Radha Mitchell, Marc Anthony, Rachel Ticotin, Mickey Rourke | Year: 2004 | Country: USA/UK | Format: 35mm
Durata: 146 minuti

Orari: Sat May 16 - 7:00 pm

item.title: Tobruk / Rough Night in Jericho (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
A daring Allied commando team, aided by a German-Jewish unit, faces enemy fire, shifting loyalties, and sabotage to infiltrate enemy lines and destroy the vital Nazi fuel depot at Tobruk guarded by General Rommel’s troops. (Universal Studios) Dean Martin lives to kill! George Peppard kills to live! And only one can survive the Rough Night in Jericho . In his first, and only, role as the villain, Martin is the corrupt sheriff of Jericho, the Wild West town he once helped to clean up. He’s ruthless and mean, controlling all businesses except for one, the stagecoach line run by a strong-willed widow (Jean Simmons). But when he pushes too far, the town must turn to a former US Marshall (Peppard) for help in this violent, tension-filled western from the creator of The Rifleman .
Cast: Director: Arthur Hiller | Writer: Leo V. Gordon | Starring: Rock Hudson, George Peppard, Nigel Green, Guy Stockwell, Jack Watson, Percy Herbert | Year: 1967 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Arnold Laven | Writer: Screenplay by Sydney Boehm and Marvin H. Albert from the novel "The Man in Black" by Marvin H. Albert | Starring: Dean Martin, George Peppard, Jean Simmons, John McIntire, Slim Pickens | Year: 1967 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 104 minuti

Orari: Tue May 19 - 7:30 pm / 9:50 pm

item.title: What’s So Bad About Feeling Good? (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
What’s So Bad About Feeling Good ? New York is about to find out when a wayward toucan unleashes a miraculous virus across the city, infecting its citizens with a euphoric high and the delirious desire to do good. A beatnik former ad exec (George Peppard) gets a new lease on life but will his girlfriend (Mary Tyler Moore) be so lucky? As the outbreak spreads & the Big Apple gets turned upside down, a government lackey (Dom DeLuise) is sent to find a fix. It’s an off-beat counterculture comedy that’s a good-natured good time. It’s sure to cure what ails you!
Cast: Director: George Seaton | Starring: George Peppard, Mary Tyler Moore, Don Stroud, Susan Saint James, Dom DeLuise | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 93 minuti

Orari: Fri May 08 - 7:30 pm

item.title: Frankenstein
item.description:
Boris Karloff stars as the screen’s most tragic and iconic monster in director James Whale’s unforgettable adaptation of the Mary Shelley novel. Obsessed with the idea of constructing new life, Dr. Frankenstein pieces together a body from the parts of others. But his experiment in reanimation unleashes a creation for which the world is not yet ready.
Cast: Director: James Whale | Writer: Screen play by Garrett Fort & Francis Edward based upon the story by Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley, adapted by John L. Balderston from the play by Peggy Webling | Starring: Colin Clive, Mae Clarke, John Boles, Boris Karloff, Dwight Frye, Edward van Sloan, Frederick Kerr | Year: 1931 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 70 minuti

Orari: Sun May 17 - 2:00 pm

item.title: Diamonds Are Forever (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
Sean Connery is back as Bond, reuniting with his Goldfinger director Guy Hamilton for a thrilling adventure speeding from the canals of Amsterdam to the neon-soaked streets of Las Vegas. Our debonair 007 must infiltrate a dangerous diamond smuggling ring where he uncovers an even more diabolical plot from his most nefarious nemesis.
Cast: Director: Guy Hamilton | Writer: Screenplay by Richard Maibaum and Tom Mankiewicz | Starring: Sean Connery, Jill St. John, Charles Gray, Lana Wood, Jimmy Dean, Bruce Cabot, Putter Smith, Bruce Glover, Norman Burton, Joseph Furst, Bernard Lee, Desmond Llewelyn | Year: 1971 | Country: UK | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 120 minuti

Orari: Sun May 24 - 2:00 pm

item.title: The Victors
item.description:
The award-winning screenwriter of The Bridge on the River Kwai and The Guns of Navarone , Carl Foreman, wrote, directed, and produced the sprawling, all-star World War II epic The Victors . The film follows a large ensemble of battle-weary American infantry soldiers in a series of vignettes, from fighting in Italy to uneasy peace in Berlin, interspersed with newsreel-type propaganda from back home that contradicts their grim reality. The movie’s monumental shoot filmed on location across Europe with an impressive cast that includes Vince Edwards, Albert Finney, George Hamilton, and George Peppard, as well as Jeanne Moreau, Romy Schneider, and Elke Sommer.
Cast: Director: Carl Foreman | Starring: Vince Edwards, Albert Finney, George Hamilton, Melina Mercouri, Jeanne Moreau, George Peppard, Maurice Ronet, Rosanna Schiaffino, Romy Schneider, Elke Sommer, Eli Wallach | Year: 1963 | Country: UK/USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 155 minuti

Orari: Mon May 25 - 7:30 pm

item.title: Crimson Tide / Déjà Vu
item.description:
Dynamic Denzel Washington ( The Pelican Brief ) joins Hollywood favorite Gene Hackman ( The Firm ) in this intense action thriller that’s a smash hit with audiences and critics alike! In the midst of a global crisis, the USS Alabama receives an unconfirmed order to launch its nuclear missiles – signaling the start of World War III! The tension quickly rises as the sub’s respected commander (Hackman) and his brilliant executive officer (Washington) clash over the validity of their orders… battling each other for control of the sub! As this epic struggle rages under the sea, Crimson Tide brings motion picture excitement to a new level – and you to the edge of your seat! (Hollywood Pictures) Academy Award winner Denzel Washington (Best Actor, Training Day , 2001) joins forces with blockbuster producer Jerry Bruckheimer and mega-hit director Tony Scott for Déjà Vu – the powerful, fast-paced action-thriller with a spectacular mind-bending twist. Called in to recover evidence in the aftermath of a horrific explosion on a New Orleans ferry, Federal agent Doug Carlin (Washington) gets pulled away from the scene and taken to a top-secret government lab that uses a time-shifting surveillance device to help prevent crime. But can it help Carlin change the past? (Disney)
Cast: Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Screenplay by Michael Schiffer, Story by Michael Schiffer and Richard P. Henrick | Starring: Denzel Washington, Gene Hackman, Matt Craven, George Dzundza, Viggo Mortensen, James Gandolfini | Year: 1995 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Bill Marsilii & Terry Rossio | Starring: Denzel Washington, Paula Patton, Bruce Greenwood, Adam Goldberg, Jim Caviezel | Year: 2006 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 126 minuti

Orari: Sun May 31 - 6:30 pm / 8:55 pm

item.title: I Love Maria / Aces Go Places IV
item.description:
As an evil gang terrorizes their city with mechanized mayhem, the police capture and reprogram one of the gang’s anthropomorphic killing machines to fight fire with fire. I Love Maria aka Roboforce is a non-stop explosion of pure cinematic excitement, goofball comedy, impressive visual effects and truly inspired action, with a cast of recognizable HK favorites including Taiwanese-Canadian pop star Sally Yeh in dual roles, Wong Kar Wai regular Tony Leung, and iconic HK filmmaker Tsui Hark. A year before his iconic City on Fire , director Ringo Lam helmed the stunt-filled fourth entry in the famed Aces Go Places franchise, giving the series a slightly harder edge while still carefully balancing the action and laughs. Baldy (Karl Maka) & King Kong (Sam Hui) are back, this time ensnared in a sci-fi styled adventure trying to recover a high-tech prism used to give superhuman powers. The Killer ’s Sally Yeh and Raiders of the Lost Ark ’s Ronald Lacey co-star.
Cast: Director: David Chung Chi-Man | Starring: John Shum, Sally Yeh, Tsui Hark, Tony Leung Chiu-Wai, Lam Ching-Ying | Year: 1988 | Country: Hong Kong | Format: English subtitled 35mm | Director: Ringo Lam | Starring: Samuel Hui, Karl Maka, Sally Yeh, Sylvia Chang, Cyrus Wong, Ronald Lacey | Year: 1986 | Country: Hong Kong | Format: English subtitled 35mm
Durata: 89 minuti

Orari: Mon May 18 - 7:30 pm / 9:40 pm

item.title: The Brigand / Mask of the Avenger
item.description:
Carlos Delargo (Anthony Dexter, Captain John Smith and Pocahontas ) is a soldier and the son of a Mandorran princess. He is charged with murder and sent back to his country, but is saved by King Lorenzo (also Dexter), as Carlos bears an uncanny likeness to the king. On a hunting trip, the king is wounded by the nefarious Prince Ramón (Academy Award winner Anthony Quinn, 1956, Best Supporting Actor, Lust for Life ). With Ramón next in line for the throne, one of the king’s aides realizes that Carlos could temporarily replace the king and help get revenge on the traitors. (Columbia Pictures) I leave my blade to the people of Casamare. If it ever be drawn again, may the cause be justice! To avenge the death of his father, Capt. Renato Dimorna (John Derek) picks up a mask and sword, christening himself The Ghost of Monte Cristo while riding into the night. Almost stealing the movie, Anthony Quinn shines as the antagonist in director Phil Karlson’s swashbuckling adventure.
Cast: Director: Phil Karlson | Writer: Screenplay by Jesse Lasky Jr., Story by George Bruce, Inspired by the story by Alexandre Dumas | Starring: Anthony Dexter, Jody Lawrance, Gale Robbins, Anthony Quinn | Year: 1952 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Phil Karlson | Writer: Screen play by Jesse L. Lasky, Jr. | Starring: John Derek, Anthony Quinn, Jody Lawrance, Arnold Moss, Eugene Iglesias | Year: 1951 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 83 minuti

Orari: Sat May 09 - 6:30 pm / 8:35 pm

item.title: The Brigand / Mask of the Avenger
item.description:
Carlos Delargo (Anthony Dexter, Captain John Smith and Pocahontas ) is a soldier and the son of a Mandorran princess. He is charged with murder and sent back to his country, but is saved by King Lorenzo (also Dexter), as Carlos bears an uncanny likeness to the king. On a hunting trip, the king is wounded by the nefarious Prince Ramón (Academy Award winner Anthony Quinn, 1956, Best Supporting Actor, Lust for Life ). With Ramón next in line for the throne, one of the king’s aides realizes that Carlos could temporarily replace the king and help get revenge on the traitors. (Columbia Pictures) I leave my blade to the people of Casamare. If it ever be drawn again, may the cause be justice! To avenge the death of his father, Capt. Renato Dimorna (John Derek) picks up a mask and sword, christening himself The Ghost of Monte Cristo while riding into the night. Almost stealing the movie, Anthony Quinn shines as the antagonist in director Phil Karlson’s swashbuckling adventure.
Cast: Director: Phil Karlson | Writer: Screenplay by Jesse Lasky Jr., Story by George Bruce, Inspired by the story by Alexandre Dumas | Starring: Anthony Dexter, Jody Lawrance, Gale Robbins, Anthony Quinn | Year: 1952 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Phil Karlson | Writer: Screen play by Jesse L. Lasky, Jr. | Starring: John Derek, Anthony Quinn, Jody Lawrance, Arnold Moss, Eugene Iglesias | Year: 1951 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 83 minuti

Orari: Sun May 10 - 6:30 pm / 8:35 pm

item.title: Django Unchained
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino’s hit western stars Jamie Foxx as Django Unchained , a slave freed by bounty hunter Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) who needs his help tracking down a trio of wanted outlaws. In exchange, Schultz agrees to help Django free his wife from evil plantation owner Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio). To a bounty hunter it’s just business but to Django it’s personal! “In Django , Tarantino is a man unchained , creating his most articulate, intriguing, provoking, appalling, hilarious, exhilarating, scathing and downright entertaining film yet.” – Betsy Sharkey, Los Angeles Times
Cast: Director: Quentin Tarantino | Writer: Quentin Tarantino | Starring: Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio, Kerry Washington, Samuel L. Jackson, Walton Goggins, Dennis Christopher, James Remar | Year: 2012 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 165 minuti

Orari: Fri May 22 - 11:59 pm

item.title: Diamonds Are Forever (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
Sean Connery is back as Bond, reuniting with his Goldfinger director Guy Hamilton for a thrilling adventure speeding from the canals of Amsterdam to the neon-soaked streets of Las Vegas. Our debonair 007 must infiltrate a dangerous diamond smuggling ring where he uncovers an even more diabolical plot from his most nefarious nemesis.
Cast: Director: Guy Hamilton | Writer: Screenplay by Richard Maibaum and Tom Mankiewicz | Starring: Sean Connery, Jill St. John, Charles Gray, Lana Wood, Jimmy Dean, Bruce Cabot, Putter Smith, Bruce Glover, Norman Burton, Joseph Furst, Bernard Lee, Desmond Llewelyn | Year: 1971 | Country: UK | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 120 minuti

Orari: Sat May 23 - 2:00 pm

item.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
item.description:
In 1990s Pittsburgh, a shy but observant teenager enters his freshman year of high school, while always watching from the sidelines. But when he encounters a pair of charismatic seniors, they’ll help him discover connection and beauty in the world around them. An excellent ensemble cast and stellar soundtrack help fuel a coming-of-age tale that feels both specific and universal. Writer-director Stephen Chobosky adapts his own critically acclaimed novel.
Cast: Director: Stephen Chbosky | Writer: Screenplay by Stephen Chbosky based on his book | Starring: Logan Lerman, Emma Watson, Ezra Miller, Mae Whitman, Kate Walsh, Dylan McDermott, Joan Cusack, Paul Rudd | Year: 2012 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 103 minuti

Orari: Sat May 16 - 11:59 pm

item.title: Princess Mononoke (Subtitled)
item.description:
The fate of the world rests on the courage of one warrior in director Hayao Miyazaki’s breathtaking Studio Ghibli epic. A young warrior searching for the cure to a deadly curse finds himself in the middle of a bitter struggle between the leader of Iron Town and the mysterious Princess Mononoke , a young girl raised by wolves, who will ferociously fight to protect her forest home. English subtitled version
Cast: Director: Hayao Miyazaki | Writer: Hayao Miyazaki | Year: 1997 | Country: Japan | Format: English subtitled 35mm
Durata: 134 minuti

Orari: Sat May 30 - 11:59 pm

item.title: The Groundstar Conspiracy / P.J. (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
George Peppard and Michael Sarrazin engage in a monumental battle of wills in this critically acclaimed espionage thriller from the early 1970s. The riveting suspense yarn begins when an explosion smashes Groundstar, a top secret government space installation. Only one scientist, a spy placed within the organization to steal the plant’s secrets, survives. But the blast has left him severely burned and unable to recall anything that happened. It’s then up to Peppard, an overbearing government security head, to do whatever is necessary to get the spy’s memory back. Failing that, the investigator plans to use the impaired scientist as human bait to bring those behind The Groundstar Conspiracy to the surface. The terrifying drama, fashioned in the Hitchcock tradition, makes spectacular use of the breathtaking scenery shot on location at Vancouver Island. (Universal Studios) Gun in one hand, a woman in the other! George Peppard is P.J. , a hard-drinking New York private eye always on the hunt for his next paycheck. But when he reluctantly takes a gig to protect the mistress of a mysterious millionaire, he’ll soon be swept into a perilous world of murder and intrigue… all the while falling for the woman in his charge. A rarely-seen and not-to-be-missed neo-noir, P.J. features Raymond Burr and Gayle Hunnicutt in stellar supporting roles.
Cast: Director: Lamont Johnson | Writer: Screenplay by Matthew Howard based on "The Alien" by L.P. Davies | Starring: George Peppard, Michael Sarrazin, Christine Belford, Cliff Potts, James Olson | Year: 1972 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: John Guillermin | Starring: George Peppard, Raymond Burr, Gayle Hunnicutt, Brock Peters, Wilfrid Hyde-White, Susan Saint James | Year: 1968 | Country: USA | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 108 minuti

Orari: Wed May 13 - 7:30 pm / 9:35 pm

item.title: A Woman of Affairs / The Single Standard
item.description:
Greta Garbo is the “unlucky in love” heroine in this silent-screen adaptation of Michael Arlen’s highly controversial novel The Green Hat. After losing the man of her dreams (John Gilbert) due to the meddling of his disapproving father, Diana Merrick (Garbo) reluctantly weds another admirer (John Mack Brown). These dubious marital beginnings become even more questionable when her new husband takes his own life. Immediately, all eyes turn to Diana, and her free-spirited lifestyle is deemed his unofficial cause of death. Socially chastised, Diana decides to live up to her reputation and ventures on a series of foreign affairs, amorously globe hopping with dignitaries from London to Cairo. This bittersweet tale of love really begins to unfold when Diana is at last reunited with her one true love – only to learn of his recent engagement. Garbo’s all-star supporting cast includes Douglas Fairbanks Jr. in an early screen appearance as Diana’s alcoholic brother and Hobart Bosworth as the meddling father. (Warner Bros) For a number of generations, men have done as they please – and women have done as men pleased. Not so for San Francisco socialite Arden Stuart (Greta Garbo). To be fulfilled, she wants the freedom men have to take – or leave – love where they find it. So she embarks on a sensual seafaring odyssey with a boxer-turned-artist who declares, “There are many theories about love, but only one answer: Equality and perfect freedom.” But can any woman be free without paying a terrible price? In this daring late silent, the divine Garbo is ideally cast playing a character in many ways like herself: unconventional, independent, desired. (Warner Bros)
Cast: Director: Clarence Brown | Starring: Greta Garbo, John Gilbert, Lewis Stone, John Mack Brown, Douglas Fairbanks Jr. | Year: 1928 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: John S. Robertson | Starring: Greta Garbo, Nils Asther, John Mack Brown, Dorothy Sebastian | Year: 1929 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 73 minuti

Orari: Fri May 15 - 6:30 pm / 8:40 pm

item.title: Crimson Tide / Déjà Vu
item.description:
Dynamic Denzel Washington ( The Pelican Brief ) joins Hollywood favorite Gene Hackman ( The Firm ) in this intense action thriller that’s a smash hit with audiences and critics alike! In the midst of a global crisis, the USS Alabama receives an unconfirmed order to launch its nuclear missiles – signaling the start of World War III! The tension quickly rises as the sub’s respected commander (Hackman) and his brilliant executive officer (Washington) clash over the validity of their orders… battling each other for control of the sub! As this epic struggle rages under the sea, Crimson Tide brings motion picture excitement to a new level – and you to the edge of your seat! (Hollywood Pictures) Academy Award winner Denzel Washington (Best Actor, Training Day , 2001) joins forces with blockbuster producer Jerry Bruckheimer and mega-hit director Tony Scott for Déjà Vu – the powerful, fast-paced action-thriller with a spectacular mind-bending twist. Called in to recover evidence in the aftermath of a horrific explosion on a New Orleans ferry, Federal agent Doug Carlin (Washington) gets pulled away from the scene and taken to a top-secret government lab that uses a time-shifting surveillance device to help prevent crime. But can it help Carlin change the past? (Disney)
Cast: Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Screenplay by Michael Schiffer, Story by Michael Schiffer and Richard P. Henrick | Starring: Denzel Washington, Gene Hackman, Matt Craven, George Dzundza, Viggo Mortensen, James Gandolfini | Year: 1995 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Tony Scott | Writer: Bill Marsilii & Terry Rossio | Starring: Denzel Washington, Paula Patton, Bruce Greenwood, Adam Goldberg, Jim Caviezel | Year: 2006 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 126 minuti

Orari: Fri May 29 - 5:30 pm / 7:55 pm

item.title: Tobruk / Rough Night in Jericho (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
A daring Allied commando team, aided by a German-Jewish unit, faces enemy fire, shifting loyalties, and sabotage to infiltrate enemy lines and destroy the vital Nazi fuel depot at Tobruk guarded by General Rommel’s troops. (Universal Studios) Dean Martin lives to kill! George Peppard kills to live! And only one can survive the Rough Night in Jericho . In his first, and only, role as the villain, Martin is the corrupt sheriff of Jericho, the Wild West town he once helped to clean up. He’s ruthless and mean, controlling all businesses except for one, the stagecoach line run by a strong-willed widow (Jean Simmons). But when he pushes too far, the town must turn to a former US Marshall (Peppard) for help in this violent, tension-filled western from the creator of The Rifleman .
Cast: Director: Arthur Hiller | Writer: Leo V. Gordon | Starring: Rock Hudson, George Peppard, Nigel Green, Guy Stockwell, Jack Watson, Percy Herbert | Year: 1967 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Arnold Laven | Writer: Screenplay by Sydney Boehm and Marvin H. Albert from the novel "The Man in Black" by Marvin H. Albert | Starring: Dean Martin, George Peppard, Jean Simmons, John McIntire, Slim Pickens | Year: 1967 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 104 minuti

Orari: Wed May 20 - 7:30 pm / 9:50 pm

item.title: The Black Arrow / Fortunes of Captain Blood
item.description:
In this crackling adaptation of the Robert Louis Stevenson tale, a knight returns from the War of the Roses only to learn that his father was murdered under mysterious circumstances. When he sets out to discover the truth, he finds his own life in jeopardy. A cast full of familiar favorites drives this lively adventure, including Louis Hayward, Janet Blair, George Macready, Edgar Buchanan and Rhys Williams, and directed by Gordon Douglas. (Columbia Pictures) Louis Hayward portrays Captain Peter Blood, a former doctor who takes to piracy after he is exiled from England for treating the wounds of an enemy soldier. During his travels, Blood meets the beautiful Isabelita (Patricia Medina), who happens to be the niece of Blood’s arch-nemesis, the Marquis de Riconete (George Macready). (Sony Pictures)
Cast: Director: Gordon Douglas | Writer: Screen play by Richard Schayer & David P. Sheppard & Thomas Seller | Starring: Louis Hayward, Janet Blair, George Macready, Edgar Buchanan | Year: 1948 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Gordon Douglas | Writer: Screenplay by Michael Hogan and Robert Libott and Frank Burt based upon the novel by Rafael Sabatini | Starring: Louis Hayward, Patricia Medina, George Macready, Alfonso Bedoya, Dona Drake, Lowell Gilmore | Year: 1950 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 90 minuti

Orari: Thu May 28 - 7:30 pm / 9:15 pm
